description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Three orchestrator changes: (a) wire EffectiveBinding.expand_implications/1 into collect_bindings at the per-layer extract_realized_by/1 site (subject layer + each requirement layer); (b) add post-concat dedup on the api_boundary tier flat list (Enum.uniq_by(& &1.mfa)) inside accumulate_tier; (c) add private seed_uncommitted_hashes/3 that runs before tier dispatch when commit_hashes? != false and umbrella? == false, computes hashes for tracked entries lacking committed hashes, and persists via HashStore.merge/2. Add Implementation.hashes_for_seeding/3 (@doc false) that builds the world via the existing private build_world/3 and returns %{subject.id => hash_bin} for non-dangling subjects.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: orchestrator_test.exs gains tests for (a) expand_implications wired per-layer; (b) post-concat dedup collapses subject+requirement duplicate impl entries into one api_boundary entry; (c) seed pass writes uncommitted hashes via merge/2; (d) gating respected (commit_hashes?: false skips seed); (e) dangling entries are not seeded.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.realized_by.implication_invoked_per_layer, implication_amplification_dedup, silent_seed.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/effective_binding.ex (S2; do not modify it here)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/canonical.ex (S3)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary.ex (S4)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/hash_store.ex (S1; do not change merge/2 here)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (only to add hashes_for_seeding/3)
- test/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator_test.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT change Orchestrator.run/2's return shape (courtesy summary deferred per Q2).
- Do NOT introduce a run_with_metadata/2 wrapper.
- Do NOT add a finding code; the seed pass is silent on the seeding run.
- The post-concat dedup applies to api_boundary ONLY; impl/expanded_behavior/use/typespecs are untouched.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S5: Orchestrator wiring (expand_implications + silent seed)
